notes: Locks each historical duty event to its own saved city/state and reverses the older route-destination overwrite when recovery metadata exists.
Adds exact-event Pickup details with BOL/shipping document and Going to fields that reopen and remain editable on the same event.
Fixes the signing BOL loop by synchronizing the exact event, route leg, and day-scoped load record, including short and legacy BOL values.
Improves GPS with multiple high-accuracy samples, server-side city/state reverse geocoding, manual-entry protection, and rejection of coarse fixes over 250 meters.
label: v96.2 Deep Scan: Location, Pickup, BOL & GPS
